title: Improved Mace Hammer
description: New, Improved, Dynamic Model for the Mace!
body:
# 
![All of the variations of Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9af4281361bdb9479264b41c84ab452c6615d2c9.png)
## 
## This Resource Pack changes the Mace model to a beautiful and large Hammer. Changes texture depending on applied Enchantments!!! 
### Enchanted versions of the Mace will only work if you have Optifine or Cit Resewn mod for Fabric!!!
## 
this resource pack was based on this video<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vAJ-ORXQnCM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
